## Description

Please provide a brief explanation of your contribution (2-3 sentences).

## Type of Contribution

- [ ] Adding new tool(s) to the list
- [ ] Updating existing entry description
- [ ] Fixing formatting or broken links
- [ ] Updating contributing guidelines
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Inclusion Criteria Checklist

I confirm that all tools in this PR meet the following criteria:

- [ ] **Legal-domain-specific**: Designed for or significantly used by legal professionals, law firms, legal technologists, legal researchers, or access-to-justice practitioners
- [ ] **Actively maintained**: Updated within the past 12 months (verify via repository, website, or release notes)
- [ ] **Publicly available**: Accessible to legal professionals without unreasonable barriers
- [ ] **Legal-adjacent category**: Includes legal research, practice management, document automation, legal education, etc.
- [ ] **Entry format verified**: Follows the exact format with dash-space-bracket-name-bracket-url-space-dash-space-description-period
- [ ] **No duplicates**: Tool is not already listed elsewhere in the document
- [ ] **Tested with awesome-lint**: Ran `npx awesome-lint` locally with zero errors

## Conflict of Interest Disclosure

**Required if applicable**: Do you have any financial, employment, or ownership interest in the tools you're adding?

- [ ] No conflict of interest
- [ ] Yes, conflict of interest exists (please disclose below)

**If yes, please include:**

```
**Conflict of Interest Disclosure:** I [your name] have a [direct/indirect] interest in [tool name] as [creator/employee/investor/other]. This disclosure does not disqualify the tool from inclusion if it meets all inclusion criteria, but ensures transparency.
```

## Additional Notes

- Have you tested the tool URL(s) and confirmed they are active (no 404s)?
- Is the tool description original (not copied from marketing materials)?
- For open-source or free tools, did you add the appropriate marker?

## Contributing Guidelines

By submitting this PR, I confirm I have read and understood the [Contributing Guidelines](../contributing.md).
